---
name: Accessibility Issue
about: Report something that doesn't work for blind or visually impaired users
title: '[A11Y] '
labels: accessibility, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## What were you trying to do?
*Describe the task in plain language — no tech jargon needed.*

## What happened instead?
*What did the app say or do? What were you expecting?*

## Which type of user does this affect?
- [ ] Newly blind (less than 2 years)
- [ ] Long-time blind user
- [ ] Elderly user / lower tech confidence
- [ ] Blind power user / developer
- [ ] DeafBlind user (braille display)
- [ ] Low vision (some usable vision)

## Screen reader / setup (if applicable)
- Screen reader: (NVDA / JAWS / VoiceOver / TalkBack / other)
- OS: (Windows / macOS / iOS / Android / Linux)
- Interface used: (voice / Telegram / other)

## Severity
- [ ] **Showstopper** — I cannot complete this task at all
- [ ] **Serious** — I can complete it but with significant difficulty
- [ ] **Minor** — Annoying but workable

## Anything else?
*Any additional context, workarounds you found, or suggestions.*
